perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a blue and white top standing in a Costco aisle, holding two Thermos brand insulated flasks (one black, one beige). A large Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) She moves the flasks closer to the camera, showcasing the textures and the 'THERMOS' logo on each. (3) The scene shifts to close-up shots of the flasks on the shelf, highlighting the metallic coffee-gold accents on the black one and the olive-green accents on the beige one. (4) The woman then demonstrates the flask's functionality, unscrewing the lid which doubles as a cup and showing the inner pour spout. (5) She demonstrates the slim-profile handle and how it saves space, then points to the price tag on the shelf. (6) The video ends with her holding the beige flask enthusiastically toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy pop music with a steady drum beat plays throughout the entire video. (2) A female voice speaks with an excited and high-pitched tone, praising the appearance and features of the flasks. (3) A male voice, located off-camera, enters the conversation to agree with the female speaker and provide additional details about the capacity and price. (4) Distinct sound effects (SFX) such as a 'pop' sound or a 'sparkle' chime are heard coinciding with text overlays appearing on screen. (5) The sound of the plastic lid being unscrewed and a metallic click when the handle is shown are clearly audible over the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue about the flask features and price. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, colorful captions such as '好看 真好看' (So good-looking), '超有質感的' (Very premium texture), '超大容量' (Huge capacity), and '保溫24小時' (Keeps hot for 24 hours) appear with an excited and emphatic tone. (3) Price Hook: A large red starburst graphic with '$1139' appears toward the end of the video to highlight the value.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Product Demonstration -> Price Reveal -> Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on-screen; 1 male hand appears briefly and his voice is heard off-camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey-blue vest over a white puff-sleeve shirt and a black skirt, carrying a small silver purse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse store interior with orange metal shelving units stacked with boxes of Thermos products and other consumer goods.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even industrial lighting typical of a warehouse.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Price Value -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific line of Thermos insulated flasks recently available at Costco. It leverages the visual appeal of new colorways ('coffee gold' and 'pearl white/green') and demonstrates practical features like the 1.2L capacity, the lid-cup, and the space-saving handle to persuade viewers of the product's quality and value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of the product, detailed feature walkthrough, and explicit price mention at a specific retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched enthusiastic delivery, fast-paced variety-show style editing with large text callouts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video fits the profile of retail-discovery content common on social media, where influencers share 'new finds' at popular wholesalers to drive foot traffic and product interest.
